Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-3pm Email (541) 676-9161 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFE RENEWAL BEHAVIORAL HEALTH LIFE RENEWAL PORTLAND ADULT AND TEEN OUTPATIENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith based comprehensive outpatient substance abuse treatment services. Specializes in cognitive/behavior therapy, dialectical behavior therapy, and telemedicine therapy. Also accepts clients that are referred from the court/judicial system (other than DUI/DWI). 18600 SE McLoughlin Boulevard Milwaukie, OR 97267 Eligibility: Age 14 and older Hours: No standard hours Email (855) 932-3582 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEW DIRECTIONS NORTHWEST INC NEW DIRECTIONS NORTHWEST INC OUTPATIENT PROGRAM OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH AND SUD ADDICTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Outpatient program offering a broad range of mental health, substance abuse and addictions, and prevention services. Services include mental health and developmental disabilities services for adults, children and families, and older adults crisis intervention; group and marriage counseling; programs to reintroduce hospital patients into their communities; help those experiencing homelessness; providing a transition from opioid and opioid-based medications to medications used to limit and reduce withdrawal symptoms (Please note: not a methadone clinic.) Behavioral Health and Wellness programs can fulfill State requirements for Driving Under the Influence (DUI)/Minor in Possession (MIP) education and treatment. Also provides Domestic Violence Intervention Program (DVIP) groups, relapse prevention groups, family counseling, and parenting and anger management classes. 3425 13TH Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 519-7126 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC CHOICES COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides substance use disorder assessment, treatment, and education. Also includes support services such as group counseling, individual counseling and case management as well as gender specific services. 205 Fruitdale Drive Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:45pm, Saturday 9am-2pm (541) 479-8847 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PROVOKING HOPE RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES ADDICTION RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer, one-on-one, and group support on topics such as recovery, relationships, stress, co-dependency, parenting, and grief. Also provides specialized information and referrals. 213 NE 10th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (971) 228-2020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RECLAIMING LIVES RECOVERY CAFÉ Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides recovery circles for individuals with alcohol and substances use disorders. Services include peer support mentoring, various classes including relapse prevention, meals and espresso-style coffee when attending the recovery circles, and family member support. 228 East Main Street Suite H Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Recovery Café: Age 18 and older who are 24 hours clean and sober Peer services and relapse prevention classes: Age 18 and older Hours: Recovery Café: Sunday 4pm-6:30pm, Monday-Tuesday 5pm-7:30pm El Camino Seguro: Thursday 5pm-7:30pm Educational classes: 5 days per week, times vary Peer support and office hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 326-1233 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SAFE JOURNEYS LLC TREATMENT AND COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides state-certified outpatient treatment for DUII and Substance Use Disorders (SUD), including relapse prevention and addictions counseling (problem gambling included). Also offers support for parenting skills, trauma, stress, anger management, life skills, and wellness coaching. Telehealth services available via audio or video conferencing. 18801 SW Martinazzi Avenue Suite 206 Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Age 21 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm by appointment only Email (503) 989-0991 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TILLAMOOK FAMILY COUNSELING CENTER ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides addiction treatment for alcohol and drug use disorder, including assessment, treatment, and prevention services. Services include specialized treatment services for women, assessment and treatment to fulfill a court order for a DUI, relapse prevention, outreach, and education. 906 Main Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 842-8201 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT COMMUNITY COUNSELING SOLUTIONS DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT LIFE RENEWAL BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ADULT AND TEEN OUTPATIENT PROGRAM NEW DIRECTIONS NORTHWEST INC OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH AND SUD ADDICTIONS OPTIONS FOR SOUTHERN OREGON INC CHOICES COUNSELING CENTER PROVOKING HOPE RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES ADDICTION RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES RECLAIMING LIVES RECOVERY CAFÉ SAFE JOURNEYS LLC TREATMENT AND COUNSELING TILLAMOOK FAMILY COUNSELING CENTER ADDICTION SERVICES
